zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzPatrick於1154年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親Patrick of Salisbury33歲，母親Ela of Ponthieu41歲。他於大約1184年與Aliénor de   Vitre結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1195年登記服兵役。他於1194年在英國被列為high sheriff of somerset and dorset。他去世於1196年4月17日在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾布拉登斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William FitzPatrick于1154年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲Patrick of Salisbury33岁，母亲Ela of Ponthieu41岁。他于大约1184年与Aliénor de   Vitre结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1195年登记服兵役。他于1194年在英国被列为high sheriff of somerset and dorset。他去世于1196年4月17日在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾布拉登斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: FitzPatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Declan, Ronan, Liam, Seamus, Sinead, Siobhan, Aileen, Bridie, Brigid, Conan.

Irish: occasionally this may be a genuine Anglo-Norman French patronymic meaning ‘son of Patrick ’, but more often it has been adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Pádraig, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Patrick’ (see Kilpatrick ).

variants.name: Patrick
meanings: Irish, Scottish, and English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French, Middle English, and Older Scots personal name Patrick (Old Irish Patraicc), derived from Latin Patricius ‘son of a noble father, member of the patrician class’. This was the name of a Christian saint, a 5th-century Romano-Briton who became the apostle and patron saint of Ireland, and it was largely as a result of his fame that the personal name was so popular from the Middle Ages onward. In Ireland the surname is usually Scottish in origin, from Scottish settlers in Ulster in the 17th century. See also Peden and McPadden , derived from pet forms of Old Irish Patraicc.
Scottish and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Scottish and Irish Gaelic Mac Phádraig ‘son of Patrick’.

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzPatrick was born in 1154, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Patrick of Salisbury, was 33 and his mother, Ela of Ponthieu, was 41. He married Aliénor de   Vitre about 1184. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1195. In 1194, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of somerset and dorset in England. He died on 17 April 1196, in Caen, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 42, and was buried in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William FitzPatrick est né en 1154, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Patrick of Salisbury, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ela of Ponthieu, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Aliénor de   Vitre environ 1184. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1195. En 1194, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of somerset and dorset à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 17 avril 1196, à Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Sutton On Trent, Nottinghamshire, Englan: Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William FitzPatrick 1154 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick of Salisbury 33 und seine Mutter Ela of Ponthieu 41. Er hat um 1184 Aliénor de   Vitre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1195 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1194, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of somerset and dorset in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. April 1196 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzPatrick è nato il nel 1154 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Patrick of Salisbury, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ela of Ponthieu, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Aliénor de   Vitre circa 1184. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1195. Nel 1194, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of somerset and dorset nel England. Morì il 17 aprile 1196, nel Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William FitzPatrickが1154年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Patrick of Salisburyは33歳，母Ela of Ponthieuは41歳であった。約1184年にAliénor de   Vitreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1195年に兵役登録をした。1194年，40歳の時，イギリスでの職業はhigh sheriff of somerset and dorsetと記録されている。彼は1196年4月17日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスケンで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラデンストクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William FitzPatrick(이)가 1154년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick of Salisbury(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela of Ponthieu(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1184년 Aliénor de   Vitre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1195년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1194년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 high sheriff of somerset and dorset이었다. 그는 1196년 4월 17일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 카이에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 브라덴스토크에 묻혔다.

pt.Sutton On Trent, Nottinghamshire, Englan: Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzPatrick nasceu em 1154, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Patrick of Salisbury, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ela of Ponthieu, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Aliénor de   Vitre aproximadamente 1184. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1195. Em 1194, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of somerset and dorset em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 17 de abril de 1196, em Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Sutton On Trent, Nottinghamshire, Englan: суттон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzPatrick родился в 1154 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Patrick of Salisbury было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ela of Ponthieu, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Aliénor de   Vitre около 1184 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1195 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1194 году, в возрасте 40 лет, работал по профессии high sheriff of somerset and dorset в местности Англия. Он умер 17 апреля 1196 г. в местности каен, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности браденсток, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William FitzPatrick nació en 1154, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Patrick of Salisbury, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ela of Ponthieu, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Aliénor de   Vitre aproximadamente 1184. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1195. En 1194, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of somerset and dorset en Inglaterra. Murió el 17 de abril de 1196, en Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
